headline: UPS (UPS) Faces Fresh Uncertainty After USPS Watchdog Flags Air Cargo Contract
summary: The U.S. Postal Service Inspector General has urged a re evaluation of the current UPS air cargo contract with USPS. The report cites volume guarantee risks and raises the possibility of recommending termination if issues are not addressed. This development introduces added uncertainty for NYSE:UPS around parcel volumes tied to postal air shipments. United Parcel Service, or UPS, is a major global package delivery and logistics company that relies on a mix of ground and air networks to move...

headline: Is United Parcel Service (UPS) Undervalued On Its Index Inclusion And Share Price Rebound?
summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) has been added to the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index and the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, drawing fresh attention to how the stock fits into portfolios focused on resilience. See our latest analysis for United Parcel Service. Index inclusion comes after a period where United Parcel Service’s share price return has been firming, with a 90-day share price return of 8.89% and a year-to-date share price return of 9.62%.
